release_review.summary: Desktop-only release: persistent startup failure indicators on environment cards, configurable SSH connect timeout, endpoint section bottom-pinning, launcher operation lifecycle tracking, and misc UI/CI fixes. No runtime protocol or compatibility window changes.
release_review.same_window_rationale: All changes are Desktop-side only: welcome page UI enhancements (failure badges, accent bars, toast copy buttons), SSH dialog UX (connect timeout setting), and CSS layout refinements. The runtime service protocol, compatibility epoch, and minimum version requirements are unchanged from v0.5.10.
checked_surfaces: Desktop welcome page environment cards (failure badge, accent bar, endpoint layout)
Desktop welcome page action toasts (copy button)
Desktop SSH connection dialog advanced settings
Desktop SSH connect timeout end-to-end flow (UI → IPC → prefs → ssh -o ConnectTimeout)
Desktop preferences persistence for SSH environments
Desktop launcher IPC normalization for SSH actions
startup report and local-ui runtime state carriers
Env App sys.ping runtime service payload
Desktop managed runtime start, attach, and open gating
Env App desktop first-screen readiness IPC
SSH-managed runtime bootstrap and attach flow
